caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a t-shirt with the text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT." The setting appears to be a casual studio environment, with framed photographs on the wall behind him and clothing racks visible in the background, suggesting it might be located within a retail space. The man is engaged in conversation, gesturing with his hands as he speaks, indicating an animated discussion. The overall atmosphere seems relaxed yet professional, typical of a talk show or interview format.
